description: Create evidence landscape visualization showing the gap between prediction and experimental validation for irg-1
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 8))

# Create a decision/knowledge landscape diagram
# Showing the gap between domain-based prediction and experimental validation

# Categories on Y-axis, evidence strength on X-axis
categories = [
    'Direct enzymatic assay\non irg-1 protein',
    'Enzymatic assay on\northologous NADAR proteins',
    'Structural evidence\n(domain conservation)',
    'Expression evidence\n(immune induction)',
    'Loss-of-function\nphenotype',
    'Cross-species NADAR\nimmune function',
    'Computational domain\nprediction'
]

# Evidence strength (0-10 scale)
evidence_strength = [0, 8, 6, 9, 0, 7, 5]

# Colors by evidence type
colors = ['#E74C3C', '#2ECC71', '#F39C12', '#2ECC71', '#E74C3C', '#F39C12', '#95A5A6']

# Labels
labels = ['No data', 'Schuller 2023\n(guanine de-ADPr)', 'NADAR domain\n(IPR012816)', 
          'zip-2 pathway\n(PMID:20133860)', 'No phenotype\n(WormBase)', 
          'Yang 2025\n(beetle NADAR)', 'de Souza 2012\nFrelin 2015']

y_pos = np.arange(len(categories))

bars = ax.barh(y_pos, evidence_strength, color=colors, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5, height=0.6)

# Add labels on bars
for i, (bar, label) in enumerate(zip(bars, labels)):
    if evidence_strength[i] > 0:
        ax.text(bar.get_width() + 0.2, bar.get_y() + bar.get_height()/2, 
                label, va='center', ha='left', fontsize=7.5)
    else:
        ax.text(0.3, bar.get_y() + bar.get_height()/2,
                label, va='center', ha='left', fontsize=7.5, color='#E74C3C', fontweight='bold')

ax.set_yticks(y_pos)
ax.set_yticklabels(categories, fontsize=9)
ax.set_xlabel('Evidence Strength (0-10)', fontsize=11)
ax.set_xlim(0, 14)
ax.set_title('irg-1 Molecular Function: Evidence Landscape\n'
             'Green = direct evidence exists; Yellow = indirect/cross-species; Red = gap', 
             fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')

# Add a vertical line marking the "sufficient for GO annotation" threshold
ax.axvline(x=7, color='navy', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, linewidth=1.5)
ax.text(7.1, len(categories)-0.3, 'Typical threshold\nfor GO MF annotation', 
        fontsize=7.5, color='navy', style='italic')

# Legend
legend_patches = [
    mpatches.Patch(color='#2ECC71', label='Evidence exists (direct/ortholog)'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#F39C12', label='Indirect/cross-species evidence'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#E74C3C', label='No data / knowledge gap'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#95A5A6', label='Computational prediction only'),
]
ax.legend(handles=legend_patches, loc='lower right', fontsize=8)

ax.invert_yaxis()
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('evidence_landscape.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Evidence landscape saved.")
